footer.tagline: Building scalable systems, clean architecture, and reliable integrations.

about.title: A senior engineer focused on scalable products and reliable delivery.
about.extra: My work spans ERP, CRM, manufacturing, e-commerce, and fintech products. I enjoy turning complex workflows into maintainable systems with clear architecture, secure integrations, and practical user experiences.

profile.headline: Senior Backend Engineer • Laravel Architect • React Developer

v1.title: Architecture that survives growth
v1.desc: I care about structure, separation of concerns, maintainability, and clean scaling paths from day one.

v2.title: Business-first execution
v2.desc: I translate requirements into systems that teams can actually operate, extend, and trust in production.

v3.title: Frontend awareness
v3.desc: Even as a backend-first engineer, I build polished interfaces with React when the product needs a stronger user experience.

v4.title: Production reliability
v4.desc: Payments, wallets, webhooks, queues, permissions, logs, and edge cases are all part of the job — not after thoughts.

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: A practical approach focused on shipping business-ready systems, not just screens.
process.s1d: I start from product logic, business constraints, and data flow before touching implementation.
process.s2d: I design modules, APIs, permissions, and edge cases with maintainability and scalability in mind.
process.s3d: I care about logs, validation, idempotency, retries, UX polish, and clean handoff for the team.

opensource.desc: A reusable Laravel package for OTP generation and verification with multiple Laravel versions support, cleaner integration, and safer limits handling.
opensource.i2d: Safer OTP workflows with abuse control
opensource.i3d: Easy adoption across auth and recovery flows
opensource.i4d: Built from real project needs, not demos

hero.headline: Architecting systems that scale gracefully.
hero.subtitle: I build production-grade platforms with Laravel and React. From massive ERPs to sensitive payment gateways, I focus on reliability, clean code, and fast execution.

highlights.title: Why I’m a strong fit
highlights.subtitle: What I focus on when building production systems.
highlights.i1d: Modular design, clear boundaries, and maintainability.
highlights.i2d: Signature validation, callbacks, retries, and idempotency.
highlights.i3d: Localization-ready UI and clean translation strategy.
highlights.i4d: Fast execution with quality and business impact.

featured.title: Featured work
featured.subtitle: A few projects that show architecture + reliability.

cta.title: Need a developer who can deliver?
cta.subtitle: Let’s talk about your product, timeline, and priorities — and ship something real.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A curated selection of work that demonstrates architecture, reliability, and business value.

afz.title: AFZ Manufacturing ERP
afz.desc: A modular manufacturing system: sizes, categories/sets, pattern cards, colorways, audit logs, and multilingual admin.
afz.h2: Advanced Livewire CRUD with soft deletes + logs

crm.title: CRM + Meta Lead Ads Pipeline
crm.desc: Leads ingestion from Meta webhooks, round-robin assignment, kanban stages, and notifications.
crm.h1: Secure webhook verify + ingestion with dedupe
crm.h2: Sales permissions and own-leads visibility rules

mecarde.title: Mecarde Wallet + Providers
mecarde.desc: Wallet top-ups via OPay + voucher providers, order flows with tracking, and exports for bulk codes.
mecarde.h2: Wallet transactions, holds, refunds & audit trails

deana.title: Deana EdTech — Time Wallet Sessions
deana.desc: Meet sessions powered by minutes wallet: free daily minutes + paid minutes with consumption tracking.

ecom.title: React Ecommerce (AR/EN + Theme)
ecom.desc: Modern storefront demo with i18n, RTL, dynamic theming, and structured pages.
ecom.h2: Dark/light mode with clean UI system

projects.private: This project can be showcased privately or on request.
projects.consultingDesc: I build custom systems with strong backend architecture, polished dashboards, and reliable integrations.

skills.title: Skills that ship to production
skills.subtitle: Hands-on experience built on real projects — with focus on performance, security, and DX.

tools.title: Tools & stack
tools.subtitle: Tech I use to ship stable solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Highlights of responsibilities, systems built, and measurable outcomes.

timeline.i1d: Built complex modules with translations, logs, and advanced Livewire UIs.
timeline.i2d: Implemented stable payment flows with callbacks, signatures, and transaction trails.
timeline.i3d: Automated lead ingestion and routing with permissions and notifications.

matrix.title: How I add value
matrix.subtitle: What I deliver beyond “writing code”.
matrix.arch1: Clear module boundaries, reusable patterns, and readable code.
matrix.arch2: Data integrity with transactions, constraints, and safe defaults.
matrix.arch3: Logs/audit trails and clean permission layers.
matrix.pay1: Webhook verification, retries, idempotency, and state machines.
matrix.pay2: Wallet holds/refunds and consistent ledger-like transactions.
matrix.ops1: Ship fast without sacrificing code quality.
matrix.ops2: Debugging, edge cases, and production hardening.

sr.title: Senior Backend Engineer
sr.desc: Architected and delivered scalable ERP systems, Wallet payment gateways, and multilingual platforms. Specialized in Laravel, React, and seamless third-party integrations.

mid.title: Full-Stack Developer
mid.desc: Developed RESTful APIs, modern dynamic user interfaces, and custom dashboards ensuring robust data pipelines and fast deployment.

events.title: Events & Milestones
events.subtitle: Releases, launches, and major delivery moments.

e1.title: ERP Manufacturing modules delivery
e1.desc: Completed core manufacturing modules with translations, logs, and advanced data tables.

e2.title: Wallet payments + OPay integration
e2.desc: Delivered end-to-end topup flow with webhook validation and unified callback view.

e3.title: Market tickers engine shipped
e3.desc: Built live-ish market tickers with fallback logic and ensureFresh updates.
